sutta: the buddha said monks 1 possessing 4 qualities is put into hell accordingly as he deserves what for he himself takes life and encourages another to do so approves of staking life and speaks in praise thereof possessing these 4 qualities 1 is put into hell accordingly as he deserves banks possessing 4 qualities 1 is put into heaven accordingly as he deserves what for he himself abstains from taking life encourages another to such abstinence approves and speaks in praise thereof these are the 4 so the next suta is similar to this that it concerns stealing and the rest 263 up to 267 they are all concerned with the precepts um then after stealing is commenting committing adultery then after that lying then after that slandering after that engaging in core speech and the last 1 engaging in idol gossip so in these few sutas the buddha said if we do these wrong things and on top of that we encourage others to do them and furthermore a proof of others doing them and the last 1 is speaking in praise of doing these evil karmas then that person is definitely put into hell accordingly as he deserves whereas another person if he abstains from all these wrong actions and then encourages others to such abstinence and then approves of such abstinence and speaks in praise lords the the the abstinence from evil karma then that person would go to heaven as he deserves so we have to bear in mind these these few things
